demo_note: This demo shows how one reconciled event record can be distributed to the right groups with explicit timing and status rules.

audiences.name: Executive Morning Digest
audiences.purpose: Shared topline readout for leadership before the first meetings of the day.
audiences.status_gate: Send only after the event file is reconciled. If a source is late, label the report Preliminary and trigger a 9:00 AM refresh.

audiences.name: Revenue And Operations Detail
audiences.purpose: More detailed follow-up for ticketing, finance, and arena operations leads.
audiences.status_gate: Release after the executive digest with the same locked numbers and a fuller breakdown by plan, section, and price level.
